output: Executed batch 3 for T5, T6, and T7. `complete_task` now extracts persisted `timeline_placement`, registers the completed generation asset on the target timeline, inserts it with `addMediaClip()`, saves via `saveTimelineConfigVersioned()`, and degrades to a recorded follow-up issue if placement fails after generation creation. Resolver-level placement persistence tests were added for the real image-generation, magic-edit, and z-image-turbo-i2i resolvers, and focused attachment/selection/prompt tests now cover timeline-backed metadata forwarding plus placement-anchor prompting. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-for-timeline-20260410-0114/execution_batch_3.json`.
deviations: T5 required one supporting type update beyond the planned file list: `supabase/functions/complete_task/completionHelpers.ts` now includes a dedicated `timeline_placement` follow-up step so placement failures can be recorded without mislabeling them.

A first plain `vitest` invocation for `complete_task` tests matched no files because the default include excludes `supabase/functions/**`; the full module was rerun with `config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts` and passed.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `extractTimelinePlacement()` in `params.ts`, then wired `complete_task` to attempt placement only after a created generation returns a usable id. The handler now loads the target timeline state, registers the completed asset in the timeline registry, inserts it with `addMediaClip()`, saves via `saveTimelineConfigVersioned()`, and records a `timeline_placement_failed` follow-up issue instead of failing completion if any placement step errors. Verification: full `supabase/functions/complete_task/params.test.ts` and `supabase/functions/complete_task/handler.test.ts` passed under the edge Vitest config.

Added `resolvers/__tests__/placement.test.ts` that calls the real `imageGenerationResolver`, `magicEditResolver`, and `zImageTurboI2IResolver` with a realistic `timeline_placement` object and asserts the returned task params still contain that object. Verification: the full placement test file passed under the edge Vitest config.

Extended the focused test surface for timeline-aware attachments and prompts: frontend tests now assert timeline attachment coordinates survive through `useSendMessage` and `AgentChat` send payloads, `selectedClips.test.ts` explicitly covers both timeline-backed placement resolution and gallery-only null behavior, and `loop.test.ts` now asserts a single selected timeline clip yields a structured `placement_anchor` in the prompt. Verification: full frontend and edge suites passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed in code and by the full `complete_task` params/handler test run that timeline insertion is only attempted when `extractTimelinePlacement()` returns a valid placement, and any later placement failure is caught into `completionFollowUpIssues` instead of failing the completed task.

Added `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/__tests__/placement.test.ts`, which exercises the real resolver functions with `timeline_placement` in their inputs and asserts the returned task params still include that exact placement object.

Updated `selectedClips.test.ts` to cover both timeline-backed placement resolution and gallery-only null behavior, and updated `loop.test.ts` to assert the placement anchor is surfaced when a single selected timeline clip is eligible.
